title: Emissive Vanilla Textures
description: A resource pack with emissive textures for some vanilla blocks and entities.
body:
Emissive Vanilla Textures

A resource pack that contains emissive vanilla textures for some blocks and entities.


### Emissive Blocks
Ores - Ancient debris - Copper & deepslate copper ore - Emerald & deepslate emerald ore - Gold, deepslate gold & nether gold ore - Iron & deepslate iron ore - Lapis & deepslate lapis ore - Nether quartz ore - Redstone & deepslate redstone ore
Blocks of raw ores - Block of raw copper - Block of raw gold - Block of raw iron
Blocks of ores - Block of copper - Block of lapis lazuli - Block of redstone
Redstone components - Redstone dust - Comparator - Repeater - Activator rail - Powered rail - Sculk sensor - Sculk shrieker - Sculk catalyst
Workstations - Blast furnace - Brewing stand
Creative mode blocks - Command block - Repeating command block - Structure block
Miscellaneous blocks - Beacon - Enchanting table - Crimson & warped stem - Small amethyst bud - Medium amethyst bud - Large amethyst bud - Amethyst cluster
### Emissive Entities
Mobs - Warden - Drowned
Miscellaneous entities - Enchanting table book - Trident - End crystal - Crimson & warped signs - Ender chest
#### Dependencies - [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) mod or optifine for emissive block texture support. - [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) mod for emissive entity texture support. --- ***Do join the linked discord to submit issues, request mod additions or give any sort of feedback regarding the project, I would love to hear from you.*** --- ### Customization A few alternative textures are provided with the pack, if there are any emissive textures you want to add, edit, replace or remove, follow these steps: - Unzip the Emissive Vanilla Textures resource pack. - Then navigate to assets>minecraft>textures>block/entity. - To add textures, add your new textures to the corresponding main texture folder. - To disable or replace textures, copy the existing textures over to the 'alterative textures' folder, if that folder doesn't exist, make one, and bring over the new textures to the main texture folder.
(This way if you change your mind, all you have to do to revert the change is to copy the old textures over from the alternative textures folder to the corresponding main texture folder again.) - To edit textures, open the textures in any image editor of your choice and save it. - Optionally, once you are done making changes head back to the root folder and you can rezip the pack or use it as such itself. ### Pack Availability This list contains all game versions that Emissive Vanilla Textures resource pack is compatible with: | Game Versions |Resource Pack Formats| Emissive Vanilla Textures Availability| |:------------------------|:-------------------:|:----------------:| | 1.6.1 - 1.14.4 | - | No | | 1.15 – 1.16.1 | 5 |Yes| | 1.16.2 – 1.16.5 | 6 |Yes| | 1.17 – 1.17.1 | 7 |Yes| | 1.18 – 1.18.2 | 8 |Yes| | 1.19 – 1.19.2 | 9 |Yes| | 1.19.3 | 12 |Yes| | 1.19.4 | 13 |Yes| | 1.20 – 1.20.1 | 15 |Yes| | 1.20.2 | 18 |Yes| | 1.20.3 - 1.20.4 | 22 |In progress| | 1.20.5 - 1.20.6 | 32 |Yet to update| | 1.21 | 34 |Yet to update| ### Credits - [New Glowing Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-glowing-ores) for some of the emissive block textures used - [Redstone Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redstonetweaksresourcepack) for some of the emissive block textures used - [Glowing](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing) for some emissive entity textures used
